title: Ubiquiti UACC-Keystone-Jack-C6 keystone Cat6 (12pcs)
description: Ubiquiti Keystone-Jack-C6 is an ideal solution for easy and quick Ethernet connection installation on patch panels or wall outlets . Thanks to the self-terminating technology , cables connect without the need for crimping, significantly simplifying and speeding up the installation process. Made from high-quality polycarbonate , it ensures durability and long-lasting performance. This unit is compatible with the Cat 6 standard, ensuring high data transfer speeds and a stable connection.
